title: Quit Playing Games (With My Heart)
why_this_song: Quit Playing Games (With My Heart) by Backstreet Boys (1996) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Quit playin' games with my heart
(Quit playin' games with my heart) With my heart
(Before you tear us apart) My heart
Quit playin' games with my heart
Na, na, na, na, na, na
Na, na, na, na, na, baby
Sometimes I wish I could turn back time

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "heart" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "heart" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "quit" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "quit" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Even in my heart I see
So what is it that you can't see?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You're not bein' true to me
(You're tearin' us apart) My heart, my heart
I should've known from the start

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Quit Playing Games (With My Heart)" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Quit Playing Games (With My Heart)" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Quit Playing Games (With My Heart)" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Quit Playing Games (With My Heart)"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Backstreet Boys one question about "Quit Playing Games (With My Heart)", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Backstreet Boys sobre "Quit Playing Games (With My Heart)", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
